description: Chapter 4 - One-dimensional problems: bound and unbound states. A guided structure for harmonic oscillators, finite wells, scattering, tunneling and uncertainty.

topics.title: Bound and unbound states: chapter roadmap
topics.note: How confinement, discrete spectra, continuum states and tunneling organize the one-dimensional models in this chapter.

topics.title: Quantum harmonic oscillator (QHO): model and scaling
topics.note: Parabolic confinement, dimensionless variables and the route from the Schrodinger equation to the Hermite equation.

topics.title: QHO: Hermite equation and energy quantization
topics.note: Normalizability, polynomial termination and the equally spaced oscillator spectrum.

topics.title: QHO: eigenfunctions, parity and probability
topics.note: Hermite polynomials, nodes, probability densities, zero-point energy and the correspondence principle.

topics.title: QHO: ladder operators and oscillator algebra
topics.note: Hamiltonian factorization, commutators, number states and the raising and lowering construction of the spectrum.

topics.title: QHO: expectation values and uncertainty
topics.note: Position and momentum moments, variances and the Heisenberg uncertainty product for oscillator eigenstates.

topics.title: Finite potential well: bound-state setup
topics.note: Piecewise wave functions, boundary matching, penetration depth and the conditions for negative-energy bound states.

topics.title: Finite-well quantization and energy levels
topics.note: Transcendental equations, graphical solutions, parity branches and the number of allowed bound levels.

topics.title: Finite-well wave functions and penetration
topics.note: Even and odd eigenfunctions, nodes, probability density and exponential leakage beyond the classical well.

topics.title: Probability current, reflection and transmission
topics.note: Incident, reflected and transmitted waves and the current-based definitions of R and T.

topics.title: Scattering from an attractive finite well
topics.note: Positive-energy solutions, boundary coefficients, exact transmission and resonant transparency.

topics.title: Delta-function well and scattering
topics.note: The zero-width limit, derivative discontinuity and the energy dependence of reflection and transmission.

topics.title: Rectangular barrier and quantum tunneling
topics.note: Evanescent waves inside a barrier, exact transmission and the exponential tunneling limit.

topics.title: Worked models and integrated practice
topics.note: Guided applications involving finite-well spectra, transmission limits, oscillator moments and barrier behavior.

topics.title: Chapter synthesis: one-dimensional quantum models
topics.note: A unified solve strategy connecting boundary conditions, spectra, wave functions, probability current and measurement.
